burden.dalyPerCapita: low; high transmissibility and productivity impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; differentiate viral vs bacterial vs allergic; red flags (pain, photophobia, vision loss, contact lens keratitis) require urgent evaluation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with hygiene and symptomatic care; antibiotics only when bacterial suspected

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: APS manages most cases; ophthalmology referral for red flags
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care (lubricants, cold compresses), antihistamine drops for allergic; topical antibiotics for suspected bacterial; infection control guidance
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Outbreak control in schools and antibiotic overuse
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Most cases manageable in primary care with clear red flag triage
